determinations.RESPONSE_SIZE_ROOT_CAUSE: unconstrained conversational OCS cognition-provider output exceeds the adapter response bound
determinations.MINIMAL_SAFE_FIX: add deterministic output budgeting to conversational OCS OpenAI provider requests while preserving the post-response fail-closed bound
determinations.EXPECTED_POST_FIX_BEHAVIOR: bounded provider responses proceed to provider envelope creation and downstream cognition normalization

certification_statement: The response-size root cause is certified as an output-budget mismatch between unconstrained conversational OCS cognition generation and the existing OpenAI adapter response bound. This certification does not implement or certify a runtime fix.
